overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a samurai riding a horse through a foggy, rain-soaked Japanese village and surrounding countryside. The character traverses wooden bridges, lumber camps, and narrow village streets with traditional architecture, encountering occasional villagers before stopping on a final bridge to overlook the misty landscape.
